api_key.description: RevenueCat secret API key, sent as an Authorization: Bearer <api_key> header. Never logged.

base_url.description: RevenueCat API base URL override for tests or proxies.

project_id.description: RevenueCat project id. Required by the apps/products/offerings/customers streams (project-scoped resources); not required by the projects stream itself, matching legacy's per-stream project_id check.

starting_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: cursor id to resume a customers/apps/products/offerings listing after.

created_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return records created at or after this value.

updated_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return records updated at or after this value.

app_id.description: RevenueCat app id for app detail, API-key, and StoreKit config streams.

customer_id.description: RevenueCat customer id for customer detail and customer-scoped streams.

entitlement_id.description: RevenueCat entitlement id for entitlement detail/product streams.

offering_id.description: RevenueCat offering id for offering detail/package streams.

package_id.description: RevenueCat package id for package detail/product streams.

product_id.description: RevenueCat product id for product detail streams.

purchase_id.description: RevenueCat purchase id for purchase detail streams.

subscription_id.description: RevenueCat subscription id for subscription detail streams.

invoice_id.description: RevenueCat invoice id for invoice-related operations.

webhook_integration_id.description: RevenueCat webhook integration id for webhook detail streams.

paywall_id.description: RevenueCat paywall id for paywall detail streams.

virtual_currency_code.description: RevenueCat virtual currency code for virtual currency detail streams.

chart_name.description: RevenueCat chart name for chart data and chart option streams.

store_purchase_identifier.description: Store purchase identifier used by the purchases search endpoint.

store_subscription_identifier.description: Store subscription identifier used by the subscriptions search endpoint.
